title: Kazandibi with Mincemeat and Turkish Spices
description: A traditional Turkish dessert with a twist, featuring mincemeat and a malty flavor. This dish is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and savory combination.
instructions: Combine milk, cream, sugar, mincemeat, xenial spices, turkish spices, and malty powder in a saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in flour to thicken the mixture.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
Remove from the oven and let cool.
Serve warm, garnished with additional turkish spices if desired.
